## MZmine Summary

```{python}
mzmine = context.get("mzmine", {})
if not mzmine:
    emit_markdown("> TODO: Populate 'mzmine' in the context file to surface preprocessing outputs.")
else:
    bullet_lines = []
    batch_file = mzmine.get("batch_file")
    if batch_file:
        bullet_lines.append(f"- Batch file: {link_label(batch_file)}")
    quant_file = mzmine.get("quant_table")
    if quant_file:
        bullet_lines.append(f"- Quant table: {link_label(quant_file)}")
    mgf_files = mzmine.get("mgf_files", [])
    for mgf in mgf_files:
        label = mgf.get("label", mgf.get("path", "MGF"))
        path = mgf.get("path")
        if path:
            bullet_lines.append(f"- {label}: {link_label(path, label)}")
    export_links = mzmine.get("exports", [])
    for export in export_links:
        label = export.get("label", export.get("path", "Export"))
        path = export.get("path")
        if path:
            bullet_lines.append(f"- {label}: {link_label(path, label)}")
    if bullet_lines:
        emit_markdown("\n".join(bullet_lines))

    plots = mzmine.get("quality_plots", [])
    if plots:
        emit_markdown("### Quality Control Plots")
        for plot in plots:
            path = plot.get("path")
            caption = plot.get("caption", path)
            if not path:
                continue
            if any(path.lower().endswith(ext) for ext in (".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".svg")):
                emit_markdown(f"![{caption}]({path})")
            else:
                emit_markdown(f"- {link_label(path, caption)}")
```
